stories.headline: Zelensky under pressure to end row with Poland over WW2 name of army unit

stories.summary: Platner wins in Maine, Republican Nancy Mace loses in S Carolina. Results for Nevada and North Carolina also announced.

stories.headline: Iran will 'pay the price' for stalled peace talks, US President Donald Trump says

stories.headline: Letter from Kyiv: The messed-up day-to-day of living under Putin’s cruel air war
stories.summary: People have absorbed violence and terror into their lives. Somehow, they keep going – quietly rescuing, evacuating, replacing, mending, adapting … and sometimes saving tiny animalsIt was a glorious balmy night, and I was walking home from dinner. I’d just eaten fried red mullet from the Black Sea on a pavement terrace, listening to the cries of the last swifts as darkness crept over the city. A couple of blocks from where I was staying, there was

stories.headline: West Bank ethnic cleansing, settler attacks Israel’s state policy: Amnesty
stories.summary: Israel uses war crimes to accelerate 'annexation agenda and settlement expansion' in occupied land, rights group says.

stories.headline: Pakistan military helicopter crashes in Kashmir, all on board killed
stories.summary: There has been a heavy security presence in Muzaffarabad amid protests in Pakistan-administered Kashmir in recent days.

stories.headline: Deadly clashes in Kenya as protesters fight US Ebola quarantine facility

stories.headline: Trump and Iran trade new threats after strikes exchanged
stories.summary: The US president warns Iran "will have to pay the price" for taking too long to agree a deal, after Tehran vows retaliation to any attacks.

stories.headline: Subprime Auto Dealer America’s Car-Mart Seeks Rescue Financing
stories.summary: America’s Car-Mart Inc., a used car seller and subprime lender, is working on an eleventh hour capital raise to stave off a potential bankruptcy filing after a cash crunch put the company on the verge of default, according to people familiar with the matter.

stories.headline: Platner’s Primary Victory in Maine Gives Democrats Hope and Fears in Key Senate Race

stories.headline: Hong Kong charges seven people and two firms over massive fire that killed 168

stories.headline: Top Goldman executive opposed David Solomon’s backing of Kathy Ruemmler

stories.headline: BoJ governor Ueda hospitalised

stories.headline: MTN Finalizing Nigeria, Uganda Fintech Spinoffs; Adds Alipay
stories.summary: MTN Group Ltd. is finalizing the spinoffs of its Nigerian and Ugandan financial-technology operations as part of a reorganization of its mobile-money unit to allow Mastercard Inc. and other strategic buyers to take minority stakes in its fintech businesses.

stories.headline: Morgan Stanley's Wilson Expects Stocks to Rise Into Year-End
stories.summary: Mike Wilson, Morgan Stanley's chief US equity strategist and CIO, explains the recent market volatility is part of an ongoing rotation among cyclical and commodity sectors. He highlights that earnings revision breadth has reached unsustainably high levels, particularly in the semiconductor sector, signaling a near-term rollover. He speaks on "Bloomberg Open Interest." (Source: Bloomberg)

stories.headline: Commerzbank Says It Raised More ‘Concerns’ Tied to UniCredit Bid
stories.summary: Commerzbank AG expressed fresh doubts whether the rising acceptance level of UniCredit SpA’s takeover bid is a full reflection of investor support.

stories.headline: Morgan Stanley's Wilson Sees Big Shift From 60/40 Strategy
stories.summary: Mike Wilson, Morgan Stanley's chief US equity strategist and CIO, says the recent equity and debt offerings signal a healthy market. Speaking with Matt Miller on "Bloomberg Open Interest," Wilson says there's enough capital out there to absorb all of the recent IPO activity. (Source: Bloomberg)

stories.headline: Metals Drop on Renewed Middle East Tensions, US Rate Outlook

stories.headline: The vanishing of Nicolás Maduro: how the former dictator is being erased from Venezuela

stories.headline: India’s Bengal pushes out Muslim Bangladeshis, deepening religious tensions

stories.headline: Man shot dead during protest against proposed US Ebola quarantine facility in Kenya
stories.summary: Police dispersed demonstrators in Nanyuki, 120 miles from Nairobi, amid rising anger at US plansKenyan police have shot dead a man during a protest against a proposed Ebola quarantine facility for US citizens.Patrick Wahome, who has organised protests in Nanyuki against the centre, told Reuters on Tuesday the man died from a gunshot wound to the head. Reporters from the agency saw his body lying motionless in a police van with a large head wound.

stories.headline: Weather tracker: Monsoon season brings vital rainfall to parts of Asia
stories.summary: India declares onset as up to 280mm of rain falls in 72 hours in Kerala, while downpours hit south-west ThailandThe monsoon season has officially begun in parts of Asia, marking the start of a period of enhanced rainfall vital to the region’s economy.The south-west monsoon begins each year as a consequence of a growing temperature difference between the Asian land mass and the Indian Ocean. stories.headline: Zelensky's close European allies set out five conditions for peace talks
stories.summary: The Ukrainian president's meeting with his staunchest European allies came as US President Donald Trump's focus shifts to the war with Iran.

stories.headline: 'No dead ends': What the Dutch can teach us about tackling youth unemployment

stories.summary: Incumbent Prime Minister Nikol Pashinyan is seeking a third term despite falling domestic support.

stories.headline: Israeli strikes kill 11 people in Gaza City, medics say
